---
title: "Cox models"
author: "Puck Quarles van Ufford"
date: today
format: html
---

# Set up

```{r}
#| label: packages
#| message: false
#| echo: true

library("tidyverse")
library("glmnet")
library("survival")
library("caret")
```

```{r}
#| label: seed
#| echo: true

set.seed(8)
```

# Load data

```{r}
#| label: load_data
#| message: false
#| echo: true

data_os <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os.tsv")
data_os_noNLP <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os_noNLP.tsv")
data_os_nogenomic <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os_nogenomic.tsv")
data_os_noNLPgenomic <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os_noNLPgenomic.tsv")

data_dfs <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs.tsv")
data_dfs_noNLP <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs_noNLP.tsv")
data_dfs_nogenomic <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs_nogenomic.tsv")
data_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs_noNLPgenomic.tsv")
```

# Settings

```{r}
#| label: settings
#| echo: true

regularization <- TRUE
alpha <- 1 # 0.5 for elastic-net, 1 for lasso, 0 for ridge

prevalence_filter <- FALSE
prevalence_threshold <- 0.95

p_value_threshold <- 0.05
```

# Prevalence filter

```{r}
#| label: prevalence_filter
#| message: false
#| echo: true

if(prevalence_filter){
  # OS
  col_prevalence <- data_os |> 
    summarise(across(everything(),
                     ~ max(table(.)/n()))) |> 
    pivot_longer(everything(),
                 names_to = "column",
                 values_to = "prevalence")
  
  cols_to_keep <- col_prevalence |> 
    filter(prevalence <= prevalence_threshold) |> 
    pull(column)
    
  data_os <- data_os |> 
    select(all_of(cols_to_keep))
  
  # OS no NLP
  col_prevalence <- data_os_noNLP |> 
    summarise(across(everything(),
                     ~ max(table(.)/n()))) |> 
    pivot_longer(everything(),
                 names_to = "column",
                 values_to = "prevalence")
  
  cols_to_keep <- col_prevalence |> 
    filter(prevalence <= prevalence_threshold) |> 
    pull(column)
    
  data_os_noNLP <- data_os_noNLP |> 
    select(all_of(cols_to_keep))
  
  # OS no genomic
  col_prevalence <- data_os_nogenomic |> 
    summarise(across(everything(),
                     ~ max(table(.)/n()))) |> 
    pivot_longer(everything(),
                 names_to = "column",
                 values_to = "prevalence")
  
  cols_to_keep <- col_prevalence |> 
    filter(prevalence <= prevalence_threshold) |> 
    pull(column)
    
  data_os_nogenomic <- data_os_nogenomic |> 
    select(all_of(cols_to_keep))
  
  # OS routine data
  col_prevalence <- data_os_noNLPgenomic |> 
    summarise(across(everything(),
                     ~ max(table(.)/n()))) |> 
    pivot_longer(everything(),
                 names_to = "column",
                 values_to = "prevalence")
  
  cols_to_keep <- col_prevalence |> 
    filter(prevalence <= prevalence_threshold) |> 
    pull(column)
    
  data_os_noNLPgenomic <- data_os_noNLPgenomic |> 
    select(all_of(cols_to_keep))
  
  # DFS
  col_prevalence <- data_dfs |> 
    summarise(across(everything(),
                     ~ max(table(.)/n()))) |> 
    pivot_longer(everything(),
                 names_to = "column",
                 values_to = "prevalence")
  
  cols_to_keep <- col_prevalence |> 
    filter(prevalence <= prevalence_threshold) |> 
    pull(column)
    
  data_dfs <- data_dfs |> 
    select(all_of(cols_to_keep))
  
  # DFS no NLP
  col_prevalence <- data_dfs_noNLP |> 
    summarise(across(everything(),
                     ~ max(table(.)/n()))) |> 
    pivot_longer(everything(),
                 names_to = "column",
                 values_to = "prevalence")
  
  cols_to_keep <- col_prevalence |> 
    filter(prevalence <= prevalence_threshold) |> 
    pull(column)
    
  data_dfs_noNLP <- data_dfs_noNLP |> 
    select(all_of(cols_to_keep))
  
  # DFS no genomic
  col_prevalence <- data_dfs_nogenomic |> 
    summarise(across(everything(),
                     ~ max(table(.)/n()))) |> 
    pivot_longer(everything(),
                 names_to = "column",
                 values_to = "prevalence")
  
  cols_to_keep <- col_prevalence |> 
    filter(prevalence <= prevalence_threshold) |> 
    pull(column)
    
  data_dfs_nogenomic <- data_dfs_nogenomic |> 
    select(all_of(cols_to_keep))
  
  # DFS routine data
  col_prevalence <- data_dfs_noNLPgenomic |> 
    summarise(across(everything(),
                     ~ max(table(.)/n()))) |> 
    pivot_longer(everything(),
                 names_to = "column",
                 values_to = "prevalence")
  
  cols_to_keep <- col_prevalence |> 
    filter(prevalence <= prevalence_threshold) |> 
    pull(column)
    
  data_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- data_dfs_noNLPgenomic |> 
    select(all_of(cols_to_keep))
}
```

# Set up cross-validation

```{r}
#| label: 5_fold_CV
#| echo: true

folds_os <- createFolds(data_os$os_status,
                        k = 5,
                        list = TRUE,
                        returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_os_noNLP <- createFolds(data_os_noNLP$os_status,
                              k = 5,
                              list = TRUE,
                              returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_os_nogenomic <- createFolds(data_os_nogenomic$os_status,
                                  k = 5,
                                  list = TRUE,
                                  returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_os_noNLPgenomic <- createFolds(data_os_noNLPgenomic$os_status,
                                     k = 5,
                                     list = TRUE,
                                     returnTrain = FALSE)

folds_dfs <- createFolds(data_dfs$dfs_status,
                         k = 5,
                         list = TRUE,
                         returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_dfs_noNLP <- createFolds(data_dfs_noNLP$dfs_status,
                               k = 5,
                               list = TRUE,
                               returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_dfs_nogenomic <- createFolds(data_dfs_nogenomic$dfs_status,
                                   k = 5,
                                   list = TRUE,
                                   returnTrain = FALSE)
folds_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- createFolds(data_dfs_noNLPgenomic$dfs_status,
                                      k = 5,
                                      list = TRUE,
                                      returnTrain = FALSE)
```

# Cox model workflow

```{r}
#| label: cox_workflow_function
#| echo: true

run_cox_workflow <- function(data,
                             time_var,
                             status_var,
                             p_cutoff = p_value_threshold) {

  outcome_cols <- c(time_var, 
                    status_var)

  all_features <- setdiff(colnames(data),
                          c(outcome_cols, 
                            "patient_id", 
                            "sample_id"))

  # Regularized Cox model
  x <- data |>
    select(all_of(all_features)) |>
    model.matrix(~ . -1, data = _)

  y <- Surv(data[[time_var]],
            data[[status_var]])

  if (regularization) {

    cvfit <- cv.glmnet(x,
                       y,
                       family = "cox",
                       type.measure = "C",
                       alpha = alpha)

    lambda_opt <- cvfit$lambda.min

    betas <- coef(cvfit, 
                  s = lambda_opt)

    beta_vec <- as.numeric(betas)

    selected_features <- rownames(betas)[beta_vec != 0]

  } else {
    selected_features <- colnames(x)
  }

  # Univariate Cox models
  if (length(selected_features) == 0) {
    return(NA)
  }

  univ_results <- map_dfr(
    selected_features,
    function(var) {

      formula <- as.formula(
        paste0(
          "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ ",
          var
        )
      )

      fit <- coxph(formula, 
                   data = data)
      
      fit <- summary(fit)

      tibble(variable = var,
             p_value  = fit$wald["pvalue"])
    }
  )

  if (nrow(univ_results) == 0) {
    return(NA)
  }

  significant_vars <- univ_results |>
    arrange(p_value) |>
    filter(p_value < p_cutoff) |>
    pull(variable)

  if (length(significant_vars) == 0) {
    return(NA)
  }

  # Multivariate Cox model
  formula <- as.formula(
    paste0(
      "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var, ") ~ ",
      paste(significant_vars, collapse = " + ")
    )
  )

  model <- coxph(formula, 
                 data = data)
  
  return(model)
}
```

# Predicting OS

## All features

```{r}
#| label: predict_os
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_os <- map_dbl(folds_os,
                  ~ {
                    
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data_os)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data_os[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data_os[test_idx, ]

        fit <- run_cox_workflow(train_data,
                                "years_to_os_event",
                                "os_status")
        
        if (is.na(fit)[1]){
          NA
        } else {
          pred <- predict(fit, 
                          newdata = test_data)
          
          risk <- -pred
          
          concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_os_event,
                           test_data$os_status) ~ risk)$concordance
          
        }})

summary_os <- tibble(
  mean_c_index = mean(res_os,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  sd_c_index = sd(res_os,
                  na.rm = TRUE),
  lower_95 = quantile(res_os, 0.025,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  upper_95 = quantile(res_os, 0.975,
                      na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Cox",
         features = "all",
         outcome = "OS",
         setting = ifelse(regularization,
                          case_when(alpha == 1 ~ "lasso",
                                    alpha == 0.5 ~ "elastic-net",
                                    TRUE ~ "ERROR"),
                          ifelse(prevalence_filter,
                                 "prevalence_filter",
                                 "classic"))) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, setting))

summary_os

write_tsv(summary_os,
          file = "../results/05_cox_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

## No NLP data

```{r}
#| label: predict_os_noNLP
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_os_noNLP <- map_dbl(folds_os_noNLP,
                  ~ {
                    
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data_os_noNLP)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data_os_noNLP[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data_os_noNLP[test_idx, ]

        fit <- run_cox_workflow(train_data,
                                "years_to_os_event",
                                "os_status")

        if (is.na(fit)[1]){
          NA
        } else {
          pred <- predict(fit, 
                          newdata = test_data)
          
          risk <- -pred
          
          concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_os_event,
                           test_data$os_status) ~ risk)$concordance
          
        }})

summary_os_noNLP <- tibble(
  mean_c_index = mean(res_os_noNLP,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  sd_c_index = sd(res_os_noNLP,
                  na.rm = TRUE),
  lower_95 = quantile(res_os_noNLP, 0.025,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  upper_95 = quantile(res_os_noNLP, 0.975,
                      na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Cox",
         features = "noNLP",
         outcome = "OS",
         setting = ifelse(regularization,
                          case_when(alpha == 1 ~ "lasso",
                                    alpha == 0.5 ~ "elastic-net",
                                    TRUE ~ "ERROR"),
                          ifelse(prevalence_filter,
                                 "prevalence_filter",
                                 "classic"))) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, setting))

summary_os_noNLP

write_tsv(summary_os_noNLP,
          file = "../results/05_cox_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

## No genomic data

```{r}
#| label: predict_os_nogenomic
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_os_nogenomic <- map_dbl(folds_os_nogenomic,
                  ~ {
                    
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data_os_nogenomic)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data_os_nogenomic[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data_os_nogenomic[test_idx, ]

        fit <- run_cox_workflow(train_data,
                                "years_to_os_event",
                                "os_status")

        if (is.na(fit)[1]){
          NA
        } else {
          pred <- predict(fit, 
                          newdata = test_data)
          
          risk <- -pred
          
          concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_os_event,
                           test_data$os_status) ~ risk)$concordance
          
        }})

summary_os_nogenomic <- tibble(
  mean_c_index = mean(res_os_nogenomic,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  sd_c_index = sd(res_os_nogenomic,
                  na.rm = TRUE),
  lower_95 = quantile(res_os_nogenomic, 0.025,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  upper_95 = quantile(res_os_nogenomic, 0.975,
                      na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Cox",
         features = "nogenomic",
         outcome = "OS",
         setting = ifelse(regularization,
                          case_when(alpha == 1 ~ "lasso",
                                    alpha == 0.5 ~ "elastic-net",
                                    TRUE ~ "ERROR"),
                          ifelse(prevalence_filter,
                                 "prevalence_filter",
                                 "classic"))) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, setting))

summary_os_nogenomic

write_tsv(summary_os_nogenomic,
          file = "../results/05_cox_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

## Only routine data

```{r}
#| label: predict_os_noNLPgenomic
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_os_noNLPgenomic <- map_dbl(folds_os_noNLPgenomic,
                  ~ {
                    
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data_os_noNLPgenomic)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data_os_noNLPgenomic[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data_os_noNLPgenomic[test_idx, ]

        fit <- run_cox_workflow(train_data,
                                "years_to_os_event",
                                "os_status")

        if (is.na(fit)[1]){
          NA
        } else {
          pred <- predict(fit, 
                          newdata = test_data)
          
          risk <- -pred
          
          concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_os_event,
                           test_data$os_status) ~ risk)$concordance
          
        }})

summary_os_noNLPgenomic <- tibble(
  mean_c_index = mean(res_os_noNLPgenomic,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  sd_c_index = sd(res_os_noNLPgenomic,
                  na.rm = TRUE),
  lower_95 = quantile(res_os_noNLPgenomic, 0.025,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  upper_95 = quantile(res_os_noNLPgenomic, 0.975,
                      na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Cox",
         features = "noNLPgenomic",
         outcome = "OS",
         setting = ifelse(regularization,
                          case_when(alpha == 1 ~ "lasso",
                                    alpha == 0.5 ~ "elastic-net",
                                    TRUE ~ "ERROR"),
                          ifelse(prevalence_filter,
                                 "prevalence_filter",
                                 "classic"))) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, setting))

summary_os_noNLPgenomic

write_tsv(summary_os_noNLPgenomic,
          file = "../results/05_cox_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

# Predicting DFS

## All features

```{r}
#| label: predict_dfs
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_dfs <- map_dbl(folds_dfs,
                  ~ {
                    
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data_dfs)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data_dfs[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data_dfs[test_idx, ]

        fit <- run_cox_workflow(train_data,
                                "years_to_dfs_event",
                                "dfs_status")

        if (is.na(fit)[1]){
          NA
        } else {
          pred <- predict(fit, 
                          newdata = test_data)
          
          risk <- -pred
          
          concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_dfs_event,
                           test_data$dfs_status) ~ risk)$concordance
          
        }})

summary_dfs <- tibble(
  mean_c_index = mean(res_dfs,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  sd_c_index = sd(res_dfs,
                  na.rm = TRUE),
  lower_95 = quantile(res_dfs, 0.025,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  upper_95 = quantile(res_dfs, 0.975,
                      na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Cox",
         features = "all",
         outcome = "DFS",
         setting = ifelse(regularization,
                          case_when(alpha == 1 ~ "lasso",
                                    alpha == 0.5 ~ "elastic-net",
                                    TRUE ~ "ERROR"),
                          ifelse(prevalence_filter,
                                 "prevalence_filter",
                                 "classic"))) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, setting))

summary_dfs

write_tsv(summary_dfs,
          file = "../results/05_cox_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

## No NLP data

```{r}
#| label: predict_dfs_noNLP
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_dfs_noNLP <- map_dbl(folds_dfs_noNLP,
                  ~ {
                    
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data_dfs_noNLP)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data_dfs_noNLP[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data_dfs_noNLP[test_idx, ]

        fit <- run_cox_workflow(train_data,
                                "years_to_dfs_event",
                                "dfs_status")

        if (is.na(fit)[1]){
          NA
        } else {
          pred <- predict(fit, 
                          newdata = test_data)
          
          risk <- -pred
          
          concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_dfs_event,
                           test_data$dfs_status) ~ risk)$concordance
          
        }})

summary_dfs_noNLP <- tibble(
  mean_c_index = mean(res_dfs_noNLP,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  sd_c_index = sd(res_dfs_noNLP,
                  na.rm = TRUE),
  lower_95 = quantile(res_dfs_noNLP, 0.025,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  upper_95 = quantile(res_dfs_noNLP, 0.975,
                      na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Cox",
         features = "noNLP",
         outcome = "DFS",
         setting = ifelse(regularization,
                          case_when(alpha == 1 ~ "lasso",
                                    alpha == 0.5 ~ "elastic-net",
                                    TRUE ~ "ERROR"),
                          ifelse(prevalence_filter,
                                 "prevalence_filter",
                                 "classic"))) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, setting))

summary_dfs_noNLP

write_tsv(summary_dfs_noNLP,
          file = "../results/05_cox_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

## No genomic data

```{r}
#| label: predict_dfs_nogenomic
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_dfs_nogenomic <- map_dbl(folds_dfs_nogenomic,
                  ~ {
                    
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data_dfs_nogenomic)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data_dfs_nogenomic[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data_dfs_nogenomic[test_idx, ]

        fit <- run_cox_workflow(train_data,
                                "years_to_dfs_event",
                                "dfs_status")

        if (is.na(fit)[1]){
          NA
        } else {
          pred <- predict(fit, 
                          newdata = test_data)
          
          risk <- -pred
          
          concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_dfs_event,
                           test_data$dfs_status) ~ risk)$concordance
          
        }})

summary_dfs_nogenomic <- tibble(
  mean_c_index = mean(res_dfs_nogenomic,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  sd_c_index = sd(res_dfs_nogenomic,
                  na.rm = TRUE),
  lower_95 = quantile(res_dfs_nogenomic, 0.025,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  upper_95 = quantile(res_dfs_nogenomic, 0.975,
                      na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Cox",
         features = "nogenomic",
         outcome = "DFS",
         setting = ifelse(regularization,
                          case_when(alpha == 1 ~ "lasso",
                                    alpha == 0.5 ~ "elastic-net",
                                    TRUE ~ "ERROR"),
                          ifelse(prevalence_filter,
                                 "prevalence_filter",
                                 "classic"))) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, setting))

summary_dfs_nogenomic

write_tsv(summary_dfs_nogenomic,
          file = "../results/05_cox_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```

## Only routine data

```{r}
#| label: predict_dfs_noNLPgenomic
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

res_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- map_dbl(folds_dfs_noNLPgenomic,
                  ~ {
                    
        test_idx  <- .x
        train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data_dfs_noNLPgenomic)), 
                             test_idx)

        train_data <- data_dfs_noNLPgenomic[train_idx, ]
        test_data  <- data_dfs_noNLPgenomic[test_idx, ]

        fit <- run_cox_workflow(train_data,
                                "years_to_dfs_event",
                                "dfs_status")

        if (is.na(fit)[1]){
          NA
        } else {
          pred <- predict(fit, 
                          newdata = test_data)
          
          risk <- -pred
          
          concordance(Surv(test_data$years_to_dfs_event,
                           test_data$dfs_status) ~ risk)$concordance
          
        }})

summary_dfs_noNLPgenomic <- tibble(
  mean_c_index = mean(res_dfs_noNLPgenomic,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  sd_c_index = sd(res_dfs_noNLPgenomic,
                  na.rm = TRUE),
  lower_95 = quantile(res_dfs_noNLPgenomic, 0.025,
                      na.rm = TRUE),
  upper_95 = quantile(res_dfs_noNLPgenomic, 0.975,
                      na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  mutate(model = "Cox",
         features = "noNLPgenomic",
         outcome = "DFS",
         setting = ifelse(regularization,
                          case_when(alpha == 1 ~ "lasso",
                                    alpha == 0.5 ~ "elastic-net",
                                    TRUE ~ "ERROR"),
                          ifelse(prevalence_filter,
                                 "prevalence_filter",
                                 "classic"))) |> 
  select(c(model, features, outcome, 
           mean_c_index, sd_c_index,
           lower_95, upper_95, setting))

summary_dfs_noNLPgenomic

write_tsv(summary_dfs_noNLPgenomic,
          file = "../results/05_cox_models_results.tsv",
          append = TRUE)
```
